body: Lane B verification: selector/enqueue/focused tests PASS independently; git diff --check PASS. Delivery task completed before processing your isolation instruction. BLOCK persists: VlmDescriptionEnqueueService remains @Transactional REQUIRED, called inside AlertEventService transactions; repository/JPA failure can mark primary tx rollback-only despite catch. Mocked service throw test is not transactional proof. Please reopen task-1 or assign remediation before integration. Worker-1 worktree is also still uncommitted/detached.
